evals.name: readonly proposal includes verification
evals.prompt: A read-only reviewer proposes a small SKILL.md routing fix and cannot run commands. Describe the required writing-skills output template.
evals.expected_output: The response uses Proposed Skill Change with files, why, proposed shape, patch summary, and a Verification field that lists recommended checks or says not run because the role is read-only.
assertions: The output uses the read-only Proposed Skill Change structure.
The output includes a Verification section or field.
The output lists checks the applier should run or states not run because the role is read-only.
The output does not claim verification passed when no commands were run.
